articles.snippet: Zeta 2.1 runs entirely on your machine. Here's how to enable it in Zed for AI-powered autocompletion without sending a single line of code to the cloud.
articles.title: 100% local AI autocomplete in Zed is now possible with Zeta 2.1

articles.snippet: ESLint and Prettier felt like the default, but Biome brought everything into a single, faster toolchain. Here is what the migration looked like.
articles.title: How I dump eslint/prettier for biome, and you should do the same!

articles.snippet: It's always complicated to manually update and deploy changes on Kubernetes infrastructure, let's simplify that with OpenTofu!
articles.title: Deploy your first app on Kubernetes with OpenTofu

articles.snippet: Install Oh My Zsh to give your black-and-white terminal a fresh new look.
articles.title: Customize your terminal with Oh My Zsh - Mac OS Tutorial

EngineeringPhilosophy.description: Freelance does not mean order-taker. On every engagement, I invest in the project as much as in the code, because good software cannot be built without understanding what it needs to solve.

pillars.description: I step into a project as if it were my own. Business context, product constraints, team history: I look to understand before I propose.
pillars.title: Real ownership

pillars.description: My experience across diverse frameworks, libraries, and business domains lets me get up to speed quickly and be fully productive in little time.
pillars.title: Versatility in practice

pillars.description: I deliver solid, maintainable code. And I always keep in mind that the best technical solution is the one that serves the product.
pillars.title: Code in service of the product

EngineeringPhilosophy.title: My <primary>approach</primary>

Hero.description: Fullstack Lead Dev (React / Node.js). I own the full product scope (front, back, infra, backoffice), align priorities with the product team, and ship.
Hero.title: I build SaaS products from architecture to <lightGradient>production</lightGradient>

seo.description: Looking for a React.js / Node.js Tech Lead to build your application? Explore my work and get in touch.
seo.title: Adrien Guesnel - Freelance Lead Tech React.js / Node.js

Projects.description: Technical challenges and measurable outcomes from the past decade of work.
Projects.heading: Selected projects

personalProjects.challenge: Centralise useful information and tools for the west coast swing dance community, often scattered across forums, Facebook groups, and word of mouth.
impact: Dedicated information and tooling platform for the west coast swing community
Regularly updated blog sharing news and tips
Community reference accessible to dancers of all levels
personalProjects.solution: Built a full website alongside a blog to gather all useful resources for the west coast swing community in one place.
personalProjects.title: Westie Babies

personalProjects.challenge: Clearly convey my freelance React/Node.js positioning.
impact: Demonstrated technical expertise through this open-source build
Generate qualified leads via the contact form
personalProjects.solution: This site explains my technical philosophy, showcases project work, and shares testimonials from past collaborations.
personalProjects.title: Professional portfolio

professionalProjects.challenge: Rebuild the authentication system with a new framework and improve the user interface - team management, whitelist setup, and budget limits on API keys.
professionalProjects.imageLabel: Auth & API Key Management Overhaul - Linkup
impact: Delivered a complete API key system: creation, revocation, budget limits, and consumption quotas
Strengthened overall platform security through a full authentication flow overhaul
Contributed to the existing Python codebase for script creation and bug fixes
professionalProjects.solution: Full rewrite of the auth system (sessions, token rotation) and design of the API key management system (quotas, budgets, teams), with React interfaces and NestJS backend, plus Python contributions on existing services.
professionalProjects.title: Auth & User Experience Overhaul - Linkup

professionalProjects.challenge: Led the end-to-end development of the Loop Aero private jet reservation platform using React.js, Next.js, and NestJS.
impact: Aligned requirements with the client and project manager through frequent checkpoints
Mentored a junior developer and safeguarded deliverable quality via reviews
Delivered a polished interface with fast loading states
professionalProjects.solution: Built the design system, orchestrated API integrations and backend architecture, and led the technical direction with regular alignment syncs.
professionalProjects.title: Private jet booking platform - Loop Aero

professionalProjects.challenge: Build the complete backend for a social network MVP in 3 months, with a moderation system operational from day one.
impact: Backend with full REST API endpoint list and Swagger documentation for integration
Moderation backoffice (users, reports, dashboards) operational at launch
Test coverage integrated into the dev cycle to maintain MVP pace without sacrificing stability
professionalProjects.solution: Developed all REST endpoints with NestJS, implemented automated tests, and delivered a turnkey moderation backoffice with Retool.
professionalProjects.title: Social Network MVP - TellDem

professionalProjects.challenge: Contribute to the overhaul of a skills assessment platform (CPF) while reducing the production support load.
impact: Proactively reduced production issues through Retool dashboards
Improved support team velocity via delivered tooling and documentation
Public and internal features shipped in close collaboration with product
professionalProjects.solution: Fullstack development of new features, creation of internal Retool tools for support, and documentation rollout for the Customer Success team.
professionalProjects.title: Fullstack Development & Internal Tooling - Chance

professionalProjects.challenge: Maintain and evolve critical microservices at a scale of one billion requests per month in an international environment (17+ countries).
impact: Stable and scalable microservices under high-volume conditions
Quality assured through a unit and visual testing strategy
New ad formats delivered to meet advertiser needs
professionalProjects.solution: Development and maintenance of microservices, creation of new ad formats, monitoring via Datadog / Sentry / Grafana, and automated test implementation (Jest, Puppeteer, Storybook).
professionalProjects.title: AdExperience Team - Ad Formats & Visibility - Ogury

cards.quote: We hired Adrien to build a feature for our LMS (NextJS, Python etc.). He grasped the stakes and needs very quickly, then delivered the work at pace. No complaints - it was a superb experience.

Adrien is without a doubt the developer I’ve enjoyed working with most as a product designer. He listens, challenges, and supports the product thinking while bringing his engineering mindset - always with kindness and intelligence.

Testimonials.description: Partners who shared how the collaboration unfolded: clear milestones, responsive feedback, and a constant pursuit of quality.
Testimonials.title: My clients trust me
